name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Located at 6898 Bandera Rd in Leon Valley, TX 78238, TitleMax Title Loans can be reached at 1-210-526-6877.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States, operating brick-and-mortar stores across multiple states. The Memphis Summer Avenue location has served the local community since February 2007 and is one of several Memphis-area branches. The company targets consumers who need fast access to cash and may not qualify for traditional bank loans due to credit history.

TitleMax's core product is the title pledge (title loan), where borrowers use a clear vehicle title as collateral to secure a lump-sum loan or a revolving flex line of credit. Borrowers retain use of their vehicle during the loan term. The company also offers an unsecured flexible line of credit, available both in-store and online, which does not require collateral. Online unsecured credit lines are restricted to residents of 11 states: AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI.

What sets TitleMax apart from payday lenders is the secured line-of-credit structure — borrowers can draw funds over time rather than taking one lump sum, which may help manage repayment. The Memphis Summer Avenue store is bilingual, serving Spanish-speaking customers. With 481+ Google reviews averaging 5.0/5, the store has a strong local reputation for responsive, courteous service. Credit checks are performed but the vehicle title allows most credit types to be accepted, broadening eligibility.

Honestly, TitleMax is a high-cost emergency credit option. The website markets 'competitive rates' but does not disclose APRs or fee schedules, making it impossible for consumers to comparison-shop without visiting a store or applying. Title loans as a product category carry significant risk: missing payments can result in vehicle repossession. Consumers who have stable income and just need fast short-term cash may find TitleMax workable, but those in ongoing financial distress should explore credit union payday alternative loans or non-profit counseling before using a title pledge.
pros: Same-day cash available — loan approved and funded in a single visit
Keep driving your vehicle while the title pledge is active
Most credit types accepted — vehicle title compensates for poor credit history
Offers both secured (title pledge) and unsecured line of credit products
Bilingual staff at the Memphis Summer Avenue location
Memphis location operational since February 2007 — established local presence
481+ Google reviews with 5.0/5 average rating indicating strong customer service
cons: APR and fee information not disclosed on website — rates listed only as 'competitive' with no figures
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to residents of 11 states only
Requires a clear vehicle title — borrowers with liens on their vehicle do not qualify
Closed Sundays; limited Saturday hours (9am–4pm) reduce accessibility on weekends
Title pledge puts vehicle ownership at risk if borrower cannot repay
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need same-day cash and have limited credit options
Borrowers in TitleMax's 11 supported states seeking an unsecured revolving line of credit
Spanish-speaking customers in the Memphis area needing bilingual financial services
Consumers with poor or thin credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners who hold a clear car title, need emergency cash the same day, and cannot access traditional credit. The primary caveat is full rate opacity — the website discloses no APR or fee data, so borrowers must visit a store to understand the true cost, and title loans as a category carry repossession risk if payments are missed.
services: Car title pledge (lump-sum loan secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (revolving credit secured by vehicle title)
Unsecured flexible line of credit (online, select states only)
Credit check with most credit types accepted
Vehicle value assessment for loan amount determination
Online application for unsecured personal line of credit
